mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username AS user_name, u.avatar, u.nickname, COALESCE(ss.name, h.name, tg.title, sp.name) AS target_name FROM comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN scenic_spot ss ON c.target_type = 'SCENIC' AND c.target_id = ss.id LEFT JOIN hotel h ON c.target_type = 'HOTEL' AND c.target_id = h.id LEFT JOIN travel_guide tg ON c.target_type = 'GUIDE' AND c.target_id = tg.id LEFT JOIN specialty sp ON c.target_type = 'SPECIALTY' AND c.target_id = sp.id WHERE c.target_type = #{targetType} AND c.target_id = #{targetId} AND c.status = 1 AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.*, u.username AS user_name, u.avatar, u.nickname, COALESCE(ss.name, h.name, tg.title, sp.name) AS target_name FROM comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN scenic_spot ss ON c.target_type = 'SCENIC' AND c.target_id = ss.id LEFT JOIN hotel h ON c.target_type = 'HOTEL' AND c.target_id = h.id LEFT JOIN travel_guide tg ON c.target_type = 'GUIDE' AND c.target_id = tg.id LEFT JOIN specialty sp ON c.target_type = 'SPECIALTY' AND c.target_id = sp.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND u.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.*, u.username AS user_name, u.avatar, u.nickname, COALESCE(ss.name, h.name, tg.title, sp.name) AS target_name FROM comment c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN scenic_spot ss ON c.target_type = 'SCENIC' AND c.target_id = ss.id LEFT JOIN hotel h ON c.target_type = 'HOTEL' AND c.target_id = h.id LEFT JOIN travel_guide tg ON c.target_type = 'GUIDE' AND c.target_id = tg.id LEFT JOIN specialty sp ON c.target_type = 'SPECIALTY' AND c.target_id = sp.id WHERE u.status = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (user_id, target_type, target_id, content, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{content}, 1, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comment WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET content = #{content} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
